# terrible_ibm_storage_virtualize_ibm_sv_manage_truststore_for_replication (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `clustername` (String) The hostname or management IP of the Storage Virtualize system.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Specifies the name of the trust store.
- `state` (String) Creates (`present`) or deletes (`absent`) a trust store.
- `username` (String) Username for the Storage Virtualize system.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize storage system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *clustername*.
- `email` (String) Specifies the certificates in the store are used to validate the email server.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `grid` (String) Specifies the certificates in the store are used for the flashsystem grid.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `ipsec` (String) Specifies the certificates in the store are used for the IPsec service.
- `key_filename` (String) SSH client private key filename. By default, ~/.ssh/id_rsa is used.
- `log_path` (String) Path of debug log file.
- `password` (String) Password for the Storage Virtualize system. Mandatory, when *usesshkey=no*.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `remote_clustername` (String) Specifies the name of the partner remote cluster with which mTLS partnership needs to be setup.
- `remote_domain` (String) Domain for the Storage Virtualize storage system. Valid when hostname is used for the parameter *remote_clustername*.
- `remote_password` (String) Password for remote cluster. Applies when *state=present* to create a trust store.
- `remote_username` (String) Username for remote cluster. Applies when *state=present* to create a trust store.
- `restapi` (String) Specifies the certificates in the store are used for the REST API.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `snmp` (String) Specifies the certificates in the store are used to validate the SNMP servers.
- `syslog` (String) Specifies the certificates to be bundled and provided to rsyslog client for making TLS connections.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `usesshkey` (String) For key-pair based SSH connection, set this field as "yes". Provide full path of key in key_filename field. If not provided, default path of SSH key is used.
- `vasa` (String) Specifies the certificates in the store are used for the VASA Provider.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
